mapper.select:
select spr.sys_id , sp.sys_id as link_sys_id , sp.plant_cd , sp.plant_nm , coalesce(spr.use_yn, 'N') as use_yn, coalesce(spr.min_length, 0) as min_length, coalesce(spr.max_length, 0) as max_length, coalesce(spr.min_uppercase, 0) as min_uppercase, coalesce(spr.min_lowercase, 0) as min_lowercase, coalesce(spr.min_number, 0) as min_number, coalesce(spr.min_special, 0) as min_special from sys_plant sp left join sys_password_role spr on spr.link_sys_id = sp.sys_id where 1=1 and sp.plant_cd != 'ADMIN' and sp.use_yn = 'Y' and sp.delete_yn = 'N'
and (sp.plant_cd like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') or sp.plant_nm like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
order by sp.plant_cd asc

select sys_id, link_sys_id, plant_cd, use_yn, min_length, max_length, min_uppercase, min_lowercase, min_number, min_special from sys_password_role where sys_id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_password_role ( sys_id, link_sys_id, use_yn, min_length, max_length, min_uppercase, min_lowercase, min_number, min_special, insert_datetime, insert_user_id ) values
( #{item.sysId}, #{item.linkSysId}, #{item.useYn}, #{item.minLength}, #{item.maxLength}, #{item.minUppercase}, #{item.minLowercase}, #{item.minNumber}, #{item.minSpecial}, now(), #{userId} )

update.foreach: update sys_password_role set use_yn = #{item.useYn}, min_length = #{item.minLength}, max_length = #{item.maxLength}, min_uppercase = #{item.minUppercase}, min_lowercase = #{item.minLowercase}, min_number = #{item.minNumber}, min_special = #{item.minSpecial}, modify_datetime = now(), modify_user_id = #{userId} where 1=1 and sys_id = #{item.sysId}
